verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I started out with Jesus At a very early age Yes, I've known Him nearly all of my life Well I admit there have been times When I faltered along the way But I'll keep trying Because somehow I've got a charge on my life And I've got a job to do And I won't stop Until it's through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm determined I've got a made up mind I can't stand around wasting my time I'm gonna keep on working for Jesus Everyday of my life 'Cause I've got heaven on my mind

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I don't have time to waste Criticizing someone else There are some things I'd rather leave behind And I don't have time to be bothered With "he said", and "she said", and "they said" 'Cause it's all I can do to keep my own self in line I must work while it's day Because the night is surely coming I'm going all the way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm determined I've got a made up mind I can't stand around wasting my time I'm gonna keep on working for Jesus Everyday of my life 'Cause I've got heaven on my mind

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You can talk about me Say what you want to say You can stand around Wasting your time But while you're talking I'm gonna keep on walking 'Cause I've got heaven on my mind
